name: Australian Standards full text refusal
input_json: {"question": "What are the AS 3959 full text requirements for bushfire construction?"}
expected_json: {"answer_contains": ["Australian Standards full text is not stored"], "citation_count": 0, "source_version_ids": [], "status": "unsupported"}
notes: Paid Australian Standards full text must never be answered from stored metadata.

name: R30 site cover stitches approved table fragments
input_json: {"question": "What is the site cover requirement for R30?"}
expected_json: {"answer_contains": ["R30 site cover: 60%"], "answer_not_contains": ["Based on the matched approved source chunks:"], "citation_titles_include_any": [["Residential Design Codes Volume 1 - April 2026 (PDF, 9.12MB)", "R-Codes Volume 1 bootstrap excerpt"]], "min_citation_count": 1, "status": "needs_human_review"}
notes: Fragmented R-Code table chunks may be stitched only within the same approved source version.

name: R30 front setback avoids conflicting density snippets
input_json: {"question": "what is the front setback for an R30 single house in Cockburn?", "source_filters": {"local_government": "Cockburn"}}
expected_json: {"answer_contains": ["R30 primary street setback: 4m"], "answer_not_contains": ["Based on the matched approved source chunks:", "Figure 3.3c", "boundary walls", "R80 Code standards"], "min_citation_count": 1, "status": "needs_human_review"}
notes: Density-specific retrieval may cite R30 context, but must not answer an R30 question with an R80 snippet.

name: Design compliance question needs project evidence
notes: Chat must not answer project compliance from source-library snippets.

name: Broad setback prompt needs specific rule context
notes: Broad setback prompts should not return fragment snippets or table debris.

name: Proposal build question needs property context
input_json: {"question": "Can I build a shed in Cockburn?"}
notes: Proposal-specific build questions require resolved project context even when lexical source matches exist.

name: First person R40 build question needs project context
input_json: {"question": "Can I build a two storey house in R40 in Cockburn?"}
expected_json: {"answer_contains": ["resolved address/profile"], "answer_not_contains": ["single house may be two storeys"], "citation_count": 0, "source_version_ids": [], "status": "missing_info"}
notes: First-person build questions must not be answered from an operative rule snippet without resolved project facts.

name: Allowed two storey house question needs property context
expected_json: {"answer_contains": ["resolved address/profile"], "answer_not_contains": ["single house may be two storeys"], "citation_count": 0, "source_version_ids": [], "status": "missing_info"}
notes: Allowed/permitted dwelling-height prompts are property-specific and must not be answered from source-library snippets alone.

name: Second storey addition question needs property context
expected_json: {"answer_contains": ["resolved address/profile"], "answer_not_contains": ["single house may be two storeys"], "citation_count": 0, "source_version_ids": [], "status": "missing_info"}
notes: Addition/extension wording for a second storey is project-specific and requires resolved project facts before any answer.

name: R30 open space returns Table B threshold
input_json: {"question": "What is the open space requirement for an R30 single house?"}
expected_json: {"answer_contains": ["R30 open space: 45%"], "answer_not_contains": ["Based on the matched approved source chunks:"], "citation_titles_include_any": [["Residential Design Codes Volume 1 - April 2026 (PDF, 9.12MB)", "R-Codes Volume 1 bootstrap excerpt"]], "min_citation_count": 1, "status": "needs_human_review"}
notes: R30 open-space questions should return the Table B minimum threshold, not generic open-space prose.

name: R30 outdoor living returns area and dimension thresholds
input_json: {"question": "What is the outdoor living area requirement for an R30 single house?"}
expected_json: {"answer_contains": ["R30 outdoor living area: 24m2 minimum area; 4m minimum dimension"], "answer_not_contains": ["Based on the matched approved source chunks:"], "citation_titles_include_any": [["Residential Design Codes Volume 1 - April 2026 (PDF, 9.12MB)", "R-Codes Volume 1 bootstrap excerpt"]], "min_citation_count": 1, "status": "needs_human_review"}
notes: Outdoor-living answers should combine the Table B area row and C1.1 minimum dimension from the same approved source.

name: Solar access demonstration cites official guidance
expected_json: {"answer_contains": ["solar access can be demonstrated"], "answer_not_contains": ["Based on the matched approved source chunks:"], "citation_titles_include_any": [["4.1 Solar and daylight access - Demonstrating solar access (PDF, 1.69MB)"]], "min_citation_count": 1, "status": "needs_human_review"}
notes: Solar demonstration method questions should cite the official DPLH guidance source, not refuse due vector-only candidate narrowing.

name: Solar access requirement prompt refuses without normative evidence
notes: A general requirements prompt must remain unsupported unless an approved source chunk has direct normative requirement evidence.

name: Average side setback method cites official guidance
input_json: {"question": "How do I calculate average side setbacks?"}
expected_json: {"answer_contains": ["average side setback"], "answer_not_contains": ["Based on the matched approved source chunks:"], "citation_titles_include_any": [["2.4 Side and rear setbacks - Calculating average side setbacks (PDF, 935.76KB)"]], "min_citation_count": 1, "status": "needs_human_review"}
notes: Average setback method questions should cite the official DPLH calculation guidance instead of unrelated Vol.2 chunks.

name: R-Codes Volume 2 design review guidance cites A4
input_json: {"question": "What information should be provided for R-Codes Volume 2 design review?"}
expected_json: {"answer_contains": ["provided by the applicant for design review"], "answer_not_contains": ["Based on the matched approved source chunks:"], "citation_titles_include_any": [["R-Codes Vol.2 - A4 Design development guidance (DOCX, 17.54KB)"]], "min_citation_count": 1, "status": "needs_human_review"}
notes: Design review information questions should cite the official R-Codes Volume 2 A4 guidance.

name: R-Codes Volume 2 development application guidance cites A5
input_json: {"question": "What materials are needed for a development application under R-Codes Volume 2?"}
expected_json: {"answer_contains": ["materials when submitting a development application"], "answer_not_contains": ["Based on the matched approved source chunks:"], "citation_titles_include_any": [["R-Codes Vol.2 - A5 Development application guidance (DOCX, 17.6KB)"]], "min_citation_count": 1, "status": "needs_human_review"}
notes: Development application materials questions should cite the official R-Codes Volume 2 A5 guidance.

name: Natural ventilation orientation cites official guidance
input_json: {"question": "How should I orient apartments for natural ventilation?"}
expected_json: {"answer_contains": ["45 to 90 degrees", "prevailing cooling wind"], "answer_not_contains": ["Based on the matched approved source chunks:"], "citation_titles_include_any": [["4.2 Natural ventilation - Optimal orientation for natural ventilation (PDF, 1013.78KB)"]], "min_citation_count": 1, "status": "needs_human_review"}
notes: Natural ventilation orientation questions should cite the official DPLH technical guidance source.

name: BAL construction requirement prompt refuses without standard evidence
notes: A public BAL form excerpt must not be used to answer construction-standard requirements.

name: Bushfire BAL basic report cites official WA form
expected_json: {"answer_contains": ["100 metres", "BAL-LOW"], "answer_not_contains": ["Based on the matched approved source chunks:"], "citation_titles_include_any": [["Bushfires: BAL Assessment (Basic) Report"]], "min_citation_count": 1, "status": "needs_human_review"}
notes: BAL report questions should cite the official WA basic BAL report form without answering AS 3959 construction details.
